Video.summary: When the Cowans find they’re growing apart after 10 years of marriage, they come before the judges for help.
Video.title: Cowan vs Cowan

Video.summary: Antonio Lopez and Yajaira Rodriguez sue wedding planner Maria Martinez for $5,000, claiming she did nothing and stole their money. Maria says Yajaira canceled meetings, and a couple’s fight caused chaos, leaving her stuck in the middle.
Video.title: Wedding Disaster

Video.summary: After years of ups and downs, the result of a DNA test will make or break a long-distance relationship.
Video.title: Webb vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Deputy Payne responds to a vehicle on fire with a teenager trapped inside.
Video.title: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Image.alt: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Video.summary: Deputy Payne exposes the jumbled and dysfunctional mind of a habitual alcoholic.
Video.title: Drunk as a Skunk

Video.summary: Deputy Carpenter investigates a marijuana grow and home theft. Deputy Bradley responds to an abusive alcoholic mother.
Video.title: Follow the Water

Video.summary: Deputies Payne and Miller apprehend a burglar under the influence at an animal hospital. The SED conducts a probation check on a known flop house.
Video.title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Image.alt: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt evacuates homeowners during the Sand Fire.
Video.title: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Image.alt: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Video.summary: The Western El Dorado Narcotics Enforcement Team shines a light on the destruction of our public land by illegal commercial Mexican cartel grows.
Video.title: Marijuana vs. the Environment

Video.summary: Deputies respond to an ongoing fight between drug users in Pollock Pines. A business owner claims she is being harassed and victimized.
Video.title: Meth Freaks Abound

Video.summary: Deputy Brady searches for a man wanted for felonious assault and domestic violence.
Video.title: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Image.alt: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Video.summary: Deputy Campora arrests two men in possession of drugs and with felony warrants. Deputies Brady and Ford enforce a restraining order.
Video.title: What Bump in My Pants?

Video.summary: Deputy Adams eradicates an indoor and outdoor marijuana grow.
Video.title: But I have a Prescription!

Video.summary: A couple get into an argument after Deputy Katz makes a felony arrest. Deputy Dacanay responds to a man attempting to break into a neighbor's home with a shovel.
Video.title: Unhappy Wife, Unhappy Life

Video.summary: Michael, a clown and Elvis Presley impersonator, is suing his talent agent for unpaid dues.
Video.title: Bonzo and the Hound Dog

Video.summary: Is this contractor crooked as a bent nail or is this homeowner's behavior in need of renovations?
Video.title: One Door Closes

Video.summary: Candace is suing a used car salesman for a car she never kept. He claims that he offered her 15 cars.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Is James splitting hairs with Carle over his bad hair day or is there just a hair more about this case?
Video.title: Splitting Hairs

Video.summary: Dolly Parton impersonator Charlene is suing her cousin over a loan. Tiffany says she never wanted repayment.
Video.title: Hello Dolly

Video.summary: Herve Ambwa is accusing his counsin of selling his beloved Wii gaming console Irvin swears he would never do such a thing and that is was stolen due to his roommates negligence.
Video.title: What Happened to the Wii?

Video.summary: Rosa says that Michael took her TV to repair and never brought it back and now she wants her money.
Video.title: Please Stand By

Video.summary: Pablo and Stepanie's relationship was all about the sex. But her change in hormones made him moan.
Video.title: Turning Her Freak Off

Video.summary: Chenelle Dawson sues Alcie Shaw for $5,000, claiming a botched dreadlock job caused pain and ruined her hair. Alcie denies wrongdoing, stating she explained her method and the plaintiff never complained.
Video.title: Dreadlock Disaster

Video.summary: Steven and Luz Spitzer hired photographer Frank Calabro for their wedding, but chaos ensued when a guest’s camera sparked a fight. Frank withheld the photos, citing a contract breach.
Video.title: Wedding Wrecker

Video.summary: Erica sues ex-roommate Palermo for $245.85 in unpaid utility bills, calling him a nightmare and inappropriate. Palermo counters for $3,300, claiming she broke their guest rules and overcharged him for rent.
Video.title: Raunchy Roommate

Video.summary: Plaintiffs Susan and Anthony claim Kim owes $744 for car repairs after paying only $56 due to a clerical error. Kim argues she paid the billed amount and was misled by the plaintiffs. Both sides accuse each other of taking advantage.
Video.title: Repair Bill Riot

Video.summary: Nicholas claims Jaleel’s loose dog attacked his Yorkshire Terrier, leaving it injured and requiring $475.48 in vet bills. Jaleel denies the attack, saying Nicholas didn’t mention injuries at the time.
Video.title: Dog Attack Anger

Video.summary: Jennifer Clayton sues Angela Elliott for $4,069.07 after receiving mismarked tiles that didn't match her bathroom. Angela offered free replacements but refused to cover installation costs, arguing Jennifer should’ve noticed the error.
Video.title: You Installed the Wrong Tiles in My Bathroom!

Image.alt: You Installed the Wrong Tiles in My Bathroom!
You Installed the Wrong Tiles in My Bathroom!
You Installed the Wrong Tiles in My Bathroom!

Video.summary: Harriet Taylor sues neighbor Annette Michael for $K after a cut vine allegedly caused a shed to collapse, destroying Lalique and Baccarat crystal. Annette denies damaging the shed, questioning why the crystal was stored outdoors.
Video.title: Roof Damage Ruckus

Video.summary: Kentra wants a paternity test after the man who signed her birth certificate has been in and out of her life.
Video.title: Believing the Birth Certificate

Video.summary: Sara is suing her ex-boyfriend for breach of contract after he let his female friend move in with him.
Video.title: Stripped Bare

Video.summary: Linda claims her daughter is lying about her being a bad mother, so she's suing for defamation.
Video.title: A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’

Image.alt: A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’
A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’
A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’

Video.summary: Ansyl is suing his former tenant for two months' rent saying she was working as a prostitute while renting.
Video.title: Ransacked by a Landlord

Video.summary: Andrea wants $3000 from her ex-boyfriend after stealing from her during her active addiction.
Video.title: Taking Advantage

Video.summary: Christopher is sued by his mother for parking tickets after being unable to forgive her for choosing drugs.
Video.title: Parking Tickets and Past Troubles

Video.summary: Jeretha is petitioning the court for a DNA test to be given to a woman she thinks is her sister.
Video.title: From Strangers to Sisters

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that, two years ago, her mother confessed that the defendant may be her biological father, so she has petitioned the court for a paternity test.
Video.title: Are You My Father?

Video.summary: Calvin must take a polygraph test after his girlfriend, Johnecia, accuses him of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Tate vs. Glass

Video.summary: A messy breakup leads to a heated dispute over car damage, cheating accusations and a demand for compensation.
Video.title: Dooley vs. Sanders

Video.summary: Yoko and Damien seek counsel from the judges on issues including parenting, property damage, and an online shopping addiction.
Video.title: Smith vs. Smith

Video.summary: A polygraph test determines the fate of a rocky relationship when Bernard and Lexus both accuse the other of cheating.
Video.title: O'Neal vs Antrom

Video.summary: A stolen car and four slashed tires have exes Tiffany and Jonathan arguing in court over who is at fault.
Video.title: Martin vs. Polite

Video.summary: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.
Video.title: Curtis vs. Garland

Video.summary: Angela is prepared to call off her wedding if her fiancée, Juan, proves to have been unfaithful.
Video.title: Martinez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: With help from a substance abuse expert, the judges coach Nohariz and Eli through marital issues and alcohol abuse.
Video.title: Gonzalez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Andre and Niemah battle in court for parental custody of a beloved pet, Bella.
Video.title: Porch vs. Gillis

Video.summary: A scandalous secret and a polygraph test alter the course of Ceia and Luis' relationship.
Video.title: Stewart vs. Abrew
